name: popiskill-video-text2video-ima-studio-v1
tagline: Text-to-video, image-to-video — Wan, Kling, Veo, Sora, Pixverse, Hailuo, SeeDance. One-stop AI video generation.
description: Premier AI video generation. One-stop access to Wan 2.6, Kling O1, Kling 2.6, Google Veo 3.1, Sora 2 Pro, Pixverse V5.5, Hailuo 2.0/2.3, SeeDance 1.5 Pro, Vidu Q2. Supports text-to-video, image-to-video, first-last-frame, reference-image modes and character consistency. Use for: video generation, text-to-video, image-to-video, character animation, product demos, social media clips, storytelling, explainer videos, multi-shot production. Optional: install ima-knowledge-ai for workflow and visual-consistency guidance. Requires IMA_API_KEY.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). It is sent to api.imastudio.com (main API) and imapi.liveme.com (image uploads). Obtain keys at https://imastudio.com. Use a scoped or test key if concerned about credential exposure.
optionalDependencyNote: When ima-knowledge-ai is installed, this skill may instruct the agent to read that skill's reference files (~/.openclaw/skills/ima-knowledge-ai/references/*) for workflow and visual-consistency guidance. The skill works standalone without it; those reads are optional. You can skip them if you do not have or trust that skill.

localPaths.purpose: Preferences (model defaults) and generation logs; logs auto-deleted after 7 days. User can delete anytime.

use_cases: Character animation, product demos, short clips
key_features: Wan, Kling, Veo, Sora, Pixverse and more
With ima-knowledge-ai for workflow and visual consistency
